tool.name: Simple Analyzer
tool.description: Simple automated analysis tool for reflectivity data using LLM models.

param.name: config_json
param.label: JSON Configuration
param.help: A workflow-state JSON (from the reduction step). Provides the reflectivity file, context file, sequence total, and LLM endpoint.

param.name: llm_provider
param.label: LLM Provider
param.help: Fills state.inputs.operator.llm.provider only if the state leaves it blank.
